findings.jp_actual: Single chapter entity extracted: title='経営戦略マネジメント'
findings.jp_expected: ocr/page_109.md also contains: chapter intro paragraph, 'ここに注目して読もう！' bullet (SWOT/PPM/CRM/SCM), syllabus URL, position table (分野/大分類 grid), '本章はここ！' callout, and two image refs (img-0.jpeg, img-1.jpeg). None of these appear in translated/structured.
findings.trace: Chapter-intro pages are structurally richer than a single title entity; the classifier extracted only the chapter heading and dropped body content. Not release-impacting since chapter-opener content is navigational rather than exam-critical.
findings.recommended_fix: Low priority: consider extracting 'ここに注目して読もう！' bullets and position-table from chapter pages for completeness.
